MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DHARMA SETIAWAN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Continued To Jul-28-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DHARMA SETIAWAN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on July 28, 2025. That department handles all wrongful eviction cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Pursuant to SF Local Rule 2.7B, all parties to provide courtesy copies to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
